alerts.title: Iran nuclear talks collapse; enrichment remains at 60% U-235 with 1-2 week breakout window
alerts.summary: NBC News, Reuters, and global_metrics confirm Iranian suspension of negotiations with US following Israeli airstrikes in Lebanon. Iran maintains 60% uranium enrichment at 1-2 week breakout timeline. Multiple headlines from Reuters, Euronews, and Kurdistan24 reference Kazakhstan's offer to host Iranian uranium stockpile as diplomatic pressure point.

alerts.title: Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire partially holds despite continued southern Lebanon strikes
alerts.summary: Reuters, BBC, and Al Jazeera report Israel killing 8 civilians in southern Lebanon attacks despite Trump-brokered partial ceasefire. Netanyahu initially ordered Beirut strike but reversed course after US intervention. Limited clashes continue along Israel-Lebanon border despite formal de-escalation announcement.

alerts.title: US political sentiment on Iran remains polarized; Trump dominance in news cycle
alerts.summary: Sentiment analysis shows US discourse at 46% positive / 44% negative split with 'Trump' as dominant keyword (96 occurrences). Intelligence community language and Rubio citations suggest internal policy realignment. Word cloud shift reflects ongoing debate over Iran nuclear deal feasibility amid kinetic operations.

alerts.title: Kazakhstan emerges as potential diplomatic hub for Iran uranium stockpile transfers
alerts.summary: Reuters, Euronews, Kurdistan24, and Financial Times report Kazakhstan offering to host Iranian highly enriched uranium stockpile as part of prospective nuclear agreement. Development represents significant diplomatic opening amid current crisis and breakout-timeline pressure. Indicates behind-scenes negotiation channel activation despite public suspension of talks.

alerts.title: Multi-domain Iranian retaliation escalates; cyber operations coupled with kinetic strikes
alerts.summary: Global_metrics and multiple cyber-security headlines (DW, Resecurity, World Economic Forum) confirm Iran-linked cyber campaigns targeting US and allied government, defense, and critical infrastructure sectors. Timing synchronized with kinetic US strikes indicates coordinated kinetic-cyber-electronic warfare response strategy across multiple domains.

analysis_note: US-Iran conflict remains at critical threshold (threat level 9) with nuclear diplomacy stalled, proxy activity elevated across three theaters (Iraq, Lebanon, Yemen), and coordinated multi-domain Iranian retaliation (kinetic, cyber, economic) offsetting temporary ceasefire momentum in Israel-Lebanon theater.
